title: OPF Theme
description: Schema for theme records in the pptx.gallery library. Each theme is a small, named bundle that pairs a color scheme, a font scheme, a default theme-controlled background, and a slide size. Themes are referenced from OPF documents via design.theme; the engine resolves the reference against catalogs.themes (inline) → catalogs.themes.source → the default catalog at https://www.pptx.gallery/themes. Inline overrides on design.colors / design.fonts / design.background / design.dimensions take precedence over a resolved theme.

$schema.description: Identifies this record as a theme in the pptx.dev library.

id.description: Stable slug used by OPF documents to reference this theme via design.theme. Lowercase kebab-case.

name.description: Human-readable theme name shown in pickers.

summary.description: One-sentence positioning of the theme — when to reach for it.
examples: A clean, minimalist theme for professional, straightforward presentations.
A rich dark-mode theme with bold contrast and modern style.

description.description: Longer prose describing what the theme looks and feels like and the kinds of decks it suits.
examples: A clean, minimalistic theme with a focus on simplicity and readability. Ideal for professional, straightforward presentations.

colorScheme.description: Catalog reference to the theme's default color scheme — resolved against catalogs.colorSchemes the same way design.colors.scheme is. Accepts a bare id, HTTPS URL, or 'pkg:' reference.

fontScheme.description: Catalog reference to the theme's default font scheme — resolved against catalogs.fontSchemes the same way design.fonts.scheme is. Accepts a bare id, HTTPS URL, or 'pkg:' reference.

dimensions.description: Default slide size for this theme. Accepts the same preset values as design.dimensions.preset.

tags.description: Free-form labels for filtering and search.

preview.description: Visual previews of the record, used by picker UIs and inline rendering. All sub-fields are optional; engines fall back gracefully when previews aren't available.

src.description: Main preview image (PNG/JPG). Used as the primary visual in picker UIs and previews of the record.

thumbnailSrc.description: Smaller thumbnail preview suited to dense grid views.

vectorSrc.description: SVG / vector preview for crisp scaling at any size.

ThemeBackgroundSlot.description: PowerPoint theme-controlled slide background slot from the active color scheme. These are slots, not assumptions about actual colors: light1 is usually white and dark1 is usually black by convention, but the color scheme controls the real values.

ThemeBackground.description: Theme-controlled PowerPoint slide background. The slot is resolved through the active color scheme and remains theme-aware.
